# TagSpecialist

> TagSpecialist is a boutique data engineering and server-side tracking consultancy based in Vancouver, Canada. We implement server-side tagging (GTM), build BigQuery data warehouses, and provide managed tracking infrastructure for e-commerce brands and agencies worldwide.

## Services

- [Server-Side Tagging Specialist](https://tagspecialist.ca/server-side-tagging-specialist): Expert server-side GTM implementation, Meta CAPI, Google Ads Enhanced Conversions, ad blocker bypass, and managed tracking infrastructure. Recovers 30-40% of lost conversion data.
- [Google Tag Manager Specialist](https://tagspecialist.ca/google-tag-manager-specialist): GTM audit and fix, server-side GTM setup, GA4 migration, e-commerce tracking, Consent Mode v2 implementation.
- [Managed Server-Side Tracking](https://tagspecialist.ca/managed-tracking): Fully managed server-side tracking from $150/month. Includes GTM server container, Google Ads Enhanced Conversions, Meta CAPI, custom domain, monitoring.
- [Data Engineering & AI Warehouse](https://tagspecialist.ca/services): BigQuery data warehouse, ETL pipelines (GA4, Google Ads, Meta, Shopify, CRM), custom SQL attribution models, GenAI analytics agents.
- [Shopify to BigQuery Pipeline](https://tagspecialist.ca/shopify-bigquery): Shopify data connector with no row limits at $50/month. Syncs customers, orders, products, order items.
- [Agency Partner Program](https://tagspecialist.ca/agency-partners): White-label server-side tracking for agencies. Earn $500-2,000/month passive revenue.

## Pricing

- Tracking Audit & Strategy: Starting at $3,500 (1-2 weeks)
- Analytics Foundation: Starting at $12,000 (2-3 weeks)
- Server-Side Infrastructure: Starting at $18,500 (3-4 weeks)
- Complete Data Infrastructure: Starting at $28,000 (5-6 weeks)
- Managed Tracking: $150-$350/month
- Monthly Retainers: $3,500-$14,000/month
- Shopify to BigQuery: $50/month

## Guides & Resources

- [Server-Side Tagging Guide 2026](https://tagspecialist.ca/server-side-tagging-guide): Comprehensive guide covering GTM server containers, data recovery, privacy compliance (GDPR, CCPA, PIPEDA), platform comparison (Google sGTM, Segment, Stape, Tealium), ROI calculator, and country-specific implementation playbooks.
- [Benefits of Server-Side Tagging](https://tagspecialist.ca/benefits-of-server-side-tagging): 7 key benefits including 30-40% more conversions, ad blocker bypass, faster page loads, privacy compliance, better ad performance, extended cookie lifespan, server-level data enrichment.
- [Unified Data Platform Guide](https://tagspecialist.ca/unified-data-platform-guide): Guide to building a marketing data warehouse with BigQuery, medallion architecture, multi-touch attribution, identity resolution, and AI activation.
- [Case Studies](https://tagspecialist.ca/case-studies): 12 real project implementations including 451% ROAS improvement, 54% revenue tracking gap fix, multi-touch attribution for ski resort group.
- [Blog](https://tagspecialist.ca/blogs): 41 technical articles on server-side GA4, BigQuery data warehouses, GTM transformations, consent management, and data engineering.

## Key Facts

- Founded by lead data engineers with 15+ years combined experience
- 70+ brand implementations across 6 countries and 3 continents
- Industries: E-commerce (DTC, Shopify), SaaS, Hospitality, Fintech, Agencies
- Documented case study ROAS improvement: up to 451%
- Server-side tracking recovers 30-40% of conversion data lost to ad blockers
- 5.0 client rating
- GCP Certified, GA4 Certified, GTM Expert
- Direct specialist access (no account managers)
- 30-day satisfaction guarantee
